noFacultiesYet: No faculties yet. Add one to tell applicants about your faculties.
facultyDescriptionPlaceholder: What this faculty offers, how it works, what students get...
facultyProgramsHint: Add each program separately so you can edit or remove it later.
facultiesFromProfileHint: Select faculties and customize which programs you offer. Add or remove items and delete categories.
noFacultiesInProfile: No faculties selected. Add from the catalog.
customizeItemsHint: Check the programs you offer. Uncheck to hide. Add custom items below.
additionalFacultiesHint: Add your own faculty names, descriptions, and programs.
selectFacultyToAdd: Select a faculty category to add.
profileIntro: Fill in your university details: they are visible to applicants on the card and university page.
onboardingStep5Hint: Review and submit. Data from step 1 will be saved.
discoveryEmptyHint: Students who show interest will appear here.
discoveryEmptyDesc: Students appear here after they click Show interest on your university from the Explore page.
privateProfileBanner: This student uses a private profile: name, photo and contact details are hidden. You still see education, skills, interests and goals.
personalHiddenForPrivacy: Hidden while the profile is private.
peerScholarshipsSectionIntro: This student received scholarship offers elsewhere. Only the city and coverage percentage are shown — not the institution name.
analyticsInterestOverTimeHint: Time-series data will appear here as students show interest.
noOfferTemplates: No templates yet. Create one to start.

tutorial.slide1Body: Fill in your university details in Profile: name, location, description, faculties, scholarships. This information is shown to applicants. Complete your profile to attract more students.
tutorial.slide2Body:
Dashboard — overview of interests, chats, offers.
Discovery — browse students and view recommendations.
Pipeline — manage students from interest to acceptance.
Scholarships — create and manage scholarship programs.
Faculties — add faculties and programs.
Analytics — view funnel and statistics.
tutorial.slide3Body: Students show interest from the Explore page. Track them in Pipeline. Open chats to communicate. Send offers when ready. Students accept or decline from their Offers page.
tutorial.slide4Body: Use the search bar to find students by name. If no results, try Search with AI for natural language queries.
tutorial.slide5Body: The AI assistant helps you with platform questions, student search, and workflows. Use the floating button or sidebar. Ask about pipeline, scholarships, or how the platform works.
